When asked to review the dependency update PR make sure:
1. RenovateBot successfully pulled and included changelog. If not, do it yourself and publish/upsert the changelog as a PR comment.
2. Analyze the changelog and commits from upstream repo and then cross-check if there are breaking changes.
3. Scan the codebase and verify what will be affected once PR gets merged, what features are missing from our codebase and what can be improved furthermore.
4. Have fun!
